"/usr/bin/ar" qc libtaihang.a CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/algorithm/bsgs_dlog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/common/check.cpp.o CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/common/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/crypto/aes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/crypto/bigint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/crypto/block.cpp.o CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/crypto/bn_ctx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/crypto/crypto_hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/crypto/ec_group.cpp.o CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/crypto/prg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/crypto/prp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/crypto/stream_cipher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/crypto/zn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/structure/bloom_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/taihang.dir/source/structure/plain_hash.cpp.o
"/usr/bin/ranlib" libtaihang.a
